name: Beacon: Procreation Company
description:
(REQUEST!) With the 'Hunter Procreation Program' in full effect, students and teachers alike must get together to create the future generations against Grimm. Your options are: Yang, Blake, Weiss, Coco, Pyrrha, Nora, Velvet, Cinder, Glynda, Emerald and Winter.
